About

The Man Behind
The Craft

Shahid Zaidi is a multi-faceted professional who seamlessly bridges the world of performing arts and elite fitness. With a commanding presence — standing at a striking 6 feet — he carries himself with the confidence of a man who has mastered multiple disciplines.

His journey in Indian television earned him recognition through Doordarshan's prestigious serial Maryada, where he brought authenticity and depth to his role. His years on the ramp have given him an intuitive understanding of projection, presence, and performance.

Beyond the screen and stage, Shahid is deeply committed to the science and art of physical transformation. As a certified trainer and dietician, he empowers individuals to achieve their peak potential — understanding that true fitness is as much a mental discipline as it is physical.

Whether in front of a camera, commanding a runway, or guiding a client through their transformation journey, Shahid brings unwavering focus and a relentless pursuit of excellence to everything he does.
